patchouli.apprenticecodex.apprentice_cod: This Patchouli book is a minimal sample for Apprentice's Codex.$(br2)It uses a conventional structure with top-level categories and individual entries nested beneath them.
This category groups item notes. For now it only contains Explorer's Codex as a simple Patchouli tree sample.
A spellbook tuned for travel and reconnaissance. It comes preloaded with utility spells that help with movement, scouting, and staying aware of your surroundings while exploring.
This entry is the smallest sample of a standalone Patchouli book with an `Items` category and a concrete child entry beneath it. More equipment or spell entries can be added beside it later.
